narrative:
Glenwillow-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 243 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 30.5 percentage points.
